## Sales Gallery    Now Open

4200 Laguna Street

Coral Gables, FL 33146

# Luxury Wellness Condos   in Coral Gables   at Cora Merrick Park

Your browser does not support the video tag.


![COSCO 04 Pool High 02](https://coramerrickpark.com/resources/INTERIOR-RENDERINGS/COSCO_04_Pool_High_02.jpg)

### Experience Mediterranean Elegance and Modern Wellness Living in Miami.

Welcome to Cora Merrick Park—Coral Gables' premier destination for luxury wellness living. Our Mediterranean-inspired condominiums offer residents a harmonious blend of timeless design and modern amenities.

Situated steps away from the renowned Shops at Merrick Park, Cora provides unparalleled access to upscale shopping, dining, and cultural experiences.

![971 Cora Constellation Group Exterior Draft 2](https://coramerrickpark.com/resources/amenities/971_Cora_Constellation-Group_Exterior_Draft-2.jpg)

### Spacious, Thoughtful Interiors with Wellness at the Forefront.

Discover our exclusive collection of luxury condominiums in Coral Gables, featuring one- to three-bedroom layouts with optional dens. Every residence is a curated experience in wellness and elegance. Situated in one of Miami’s most walkable and refined neighborhoods, Cora Merrick Park is designed to elevate your lifestyle with purpose. Each detail of the community reflects a dedication to holistic wellness, architectural harmony, and vibrant urban living. Here, home is more than a place—it’s an experience that nourishes balance and belonging.

[The Vision](https://coramerrickpark.com/architecture-design)

![971 Cora Constellation Group Sauna For web min](https://coramerrickpark.com/resources/gallery/interior/971_Cora_Constellation-Group_Sauna_For_web-min.jpg)

### A Sanctuary of Wellness at the Core of Coral Gables Living.

At Cora Merrick Park, amenities aren’t just for convenience—they’re designed for restoration and peak living. Cora Merrick Park redefines residential wellness with spa-inspired spaces designed to calm the senses and renew the spirit. From the purity of the air to the warmth of the textures, every surface and sensation has been chosen with intention. Enjoy immersive experiences in our infrared sauna, steam room, and contrast hydrotherapy pools—all part of a holistic approach to everyday balance.

[Wellness Features](https://coramerrickpark.com/wellness)

A healthy home is more than just a structure — it’s an environment built to actively promote the health and well-being of its residents.

[Explore Residences](https://coramerrickpark.com/residences)

![Cora Gables 0915 copy web](https://coramerrickpark.com/resources/Cora_Gables_0915-copy-web.jpg)

### Steps from Shopping, Dining, and Cultural Charm.

Just steps from the Shops at Merrick Park, Cora is surrounded by the beauty and vibrancy of one of Miami’s most celebrated neighborhoods. With its Mediterranean-inspired architecture, lush green spaces, and walkable tree-lined avenues, Coral Gables offers a lifestyle steeped in history, elegance, and modern convenience. Cora complements this legacy with a fresh perspective—bringing refined energy and wellness-centered living to a beloved enclave.

[The Neighborhood](https://coramerrickpark.com/location)

Welcome to Cora

# Cora Merrick Park

### **Coral Gables / 2028**

12 Stories / 74 Residences of
1 to 3 Bedrooms

**4241 Aurora Street, Coral Gables, FL 33146**

Cora Merrick Park is a luxury residential condo. Its facade features classic bronze accents, textured stucco, and oolite stone combined with graceful traditional columns. Cora offers only 12 stories with 74 super exclusive residences from 1 to 3 bedrooms, with spectacular finishes and fully furnished apartments designed by the famous Urban Robot. Top of the line amenities will provide a pool, gym, sauna, club room, business center, social areas, and much more. Cora residents are seamlessly connected to the Shops at Merrick Park, al fresco dining and wellness options.

[3 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/coramerrickpark/#ForSale) from $1,264,000 to $2,697,000

Average Listing: $1,390 x SF ($14,962 x M2)

## Features

### Building Features

- Expansive lobby with coworking and lounge
- 5,000 SF lush on-site park featuring renowned artist Jaume Plensa art installation and seating areas
- Cora is a WELL certified building
- Air and water purification systems
- Innovative lighting technology maximizes natural light and provides balanced illumination
- Non-toxic materials with low-VOC paints, coatings, and sealants for better air quality and reduced exposure to toxins
- Outdoor rooftop padel court, the first in Coral Gables
- Dedicated concierge trained in wellness 24/7 attended lobby
- Rooftop pool with sun shelf and dedicated cabanas
- State-of-the-art fitness center Hot and cold plunges
- Steam room and Infrared sauna
- Red light therapy
- Outdoor wellness lounge and yoga terrace
- Resident lounge with catering kitchen
- Dedicated boardroom and coworking spaces
- Outdoor kitchen
- Screening and media lounge

### Residence Features

- Contemporary mediterranean design
- One- to three-bedrooms with den residences, ranging from 678 to 2,651 SF
- Flexible unit combinations available to create larger, customized living spaces
- 10’ Ceiling heights
- Light-filled layouts with floor-to-ceiling windows
- Expansive private balconies
- Spacious lanais, up to 1,118 SF, available
on select floorplans
- Advanced air and water purification systems
- Stone counter tops with designer fixtures
- Spacious kitchen islands
- Designer Italian cabinetry
- Sub-Zero/Wolf appliance suite
- Sophisticated stone flooring throughout
- Finished designer closets
- Red light therapy incorporated into
primary bathrooms for enhanced wellness

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/20-Cora-Pool.jpg)
